fields.lane: two-Mac distributed layer-sharding SERVE (master shard 0..24 local 16GB M4, worker 24..48 on the second 16GB M4, wire v1 over an ssh-forwarded port per the recorded Local Network privacy constraint)
fields.results: model-promotion-smoke-bundle passed=true end-to-end: idempotent load, /v1/completions, /v1/chat/completions, capabilities expectations (row gemma4_12b_it_q8_0, status supported_exact_row_smoke, contract_supported true, WebUI chat enabled), generation timings, and the frontend WebUI closure incl. 9 visible streaming updates through the distributed lane

claim_boundary: Exact-row text-token generation within the checked basic_v1 prompt pack and API smoke envelope only. No bounded-context promotion, no performance claim beyond the raw logs, no multimodal input (fails closed with a typed error), no neighboring-row or Gemma-family support, no shared-memory claim (distributed mode is layer sharding).
